steps.title: Reproduce bug
steps.description: Capture the smallest command, fixture, or UI path that reproduces the failure.
steps.acceptance_criteria: The bug is reproduced with concrete evidence before implementation starts.

steps.title: Run five whys
steps.description: Trace the symptom to the smallest root cause and document the causal chain.
steps.acceptance_criteria: A root-cause note explains why the failure happened and why the fix addresses it.

steps.title: Verify bug fix
steps.description: Run the focused acceptance test or regression command that proves the bug is fixed.
steps.acceptance_criteria: Verification evidence is recorded before the bug can be completed.
